packages.alpaca-core: Shared primitives for the alpaca-rust workspace
packages.alpaca-rest-http: Shared HTTP transport layer for the alpaca-rust workspace
packages.alpaca-data: Rust client for the Alpaca Market Data HTTP API
packages.alpaca-trade: Rust client for the Alpaca Trading HTTP API
packages.alpaca-mock: Executable mock server for alpaca-rust trading and market-data flows
